step_rationale: Endothelial adhesion molecule; activated in response to endothelial injury and inflammation; mediates monocyte recruitment.
mechanism: Soluble VCAM-1 is an endothelial adhesion molecule upregulated during endothelial activation and dysfunction; it mediates leukocyte recruitment into atherosclerotic plaques and correlates with endothelial erosion and thrombotic complications.
